description: Shared fixture catalogue for integration and end-to-end test specifications.

input_sample_bib.purpose: Canonical sample BibTeX input for functional test scenarios.

input_iclr2025_1k_bib.purpose: Large real-world BibTeX input for representative high-volume scenarios.

template_entry_md.purpose: Markdown output template for per-entry rendering scenarios.

template_entry_single_json.purpose: Single-output template for rendering all selected entries into one file.

inline_author_formats.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source that mixes Last, First and First Last author formats.

inline_author_edge_forms.purpose: BibTeX author fields covering brace-protected corporate names, uppercase AND separators, line-wrapped author lists, nobiliary particles and Jr-style suffixes.

inline_wrapped_field_values.purpose: BibTeX entry whose title and keywords values are wrapped across indented source lines.

inline_non_standard_fields.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source that includes non-standard fields such as abstract and keywords.

inline_month_and_day_formats.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source covering named months, numeric months and single-digit day values.

inline_keywords_mixed_punctuation.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source with keywords containing spaces and punctuation that must be slugified.

inline_raw_bibtex_entry.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source used to verify raw_bibtex exposure in templates.

inline_multiple_entries.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source containing multiple entries for entries-collection scenarios.

inline_latex_substitution_bib.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source with LaTeX snippets used to verify helper-based substitution behaviour.

inline_latex_substitution_cascade_bib.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source containing tokens where one substitution output could match another key, used to verify non-cascading behaviour.

inline_latex_substitution_boundary_bib.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source containing longer commands sharing a prefix with mapped control-word keys, used to verify command-token boundary matching (requirement IF-TPL-1.4).

inline_latex_text_samples.purpose: Minimal LaTeX text samples used to verify that the latex_substitute helper function and filter are available through a default-initialised template engine.

inline_latex_math_mode_bib.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source with mixed plain text and $...$, $$...$$, \(...\), and \[...\] math mode regions for latex_substitute preservation checks.

inline_latex_math_mode_real_tokens_bib.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source with real built-in default substitution-map tokens across plain text and $...$, $$...$$, \(...\), and \[...\] math mode regions.

inline_latex_math_mode_unclosed_double_d.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source containing an unclosed $$ opener followed by a later $...$ segment, used to verify that the second $ in $$ is treated as plain text rather than a single-dollar opener.

inline_math_preservation_bib.purpose: BibTeX source with multiple math mode regions using various delimiters ($...$, $$...$$, \(...\), \[...\]) to verify consistent math segment identification and preservation even in edge cases (requirement IF-TPL-1.3).

inline_custom_latex_substitution_map.purpose: Custom LaTeX substitution map JSON used to verify override behaviour for built-in defaults.

template_single_entries.purpose: Minimal template that iterates over the entries collection in single-output mode.

template_latex_substitute.purpose: Minimal template that calls latex_substitute for field-level LaTeX to plaintext conversion.

invalid_template_comment_syntax.purpose: Template content that should fail Tera parsing and expose the underlying error.

malformed_bibtex_input.purpose: Invalid BibTeX content used to verify immediate parse failure paths.

nonmatching_selection_keys.purpose: Entry keys guaranteed to be absent from the input fixtures, used for empty-selection scenarios.

missing_input_path.purpose: Reference to a non-existent input path used for file-not-found error scenarios.

missing_template_path.purpose: Reference to a non-existent template path used for file-not-found error scenarios.

preexisting_output_file.purpose: Pre-created output artefact used to verify overwrite and skip behaviour.

expected_file_names.purpose: Expected file names for supported naming strategies for the selected input fixture set.

expected_single_mode_name.purpose: Expected single-output file name derived from the input and template file stems.

selected_entry_keys.purpose: Representative include and exclude key selections used for info command scenarios.

selected_entry_types.purpose: Representative include-type and exclude-type selections used for transform and info command scenarios.

representative_random_subset_rule.purpose: Documented rule for choosing a repeatable representative subset when exhaustive output checking is unnecessary.

symlinked_escape_directory.purpose: Runtime-created directory containing a symbolic link whose target resolves outside the scanned directory, used for path-traversal rejection scenarios.
